title: mercurialis perennis var. ovata
intro: Mercurialis perennis var. ovata is a variety of the perennial plant Mercurialis perennis, commonly known as the dog's mercury. It is a flowering plant native to Europe, often used in traditional herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Mercurialis perennis var. ovata include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of tinctures or infusions, have been used to promote health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
